word: G5012 - ταπεινοφροσύνη - tapeinophrosýnē - tap-i-nof-ros-oo'-nay - Humbleness of mind

sections.paragraph:
ταπεινοφροσύνη - tapeinophrosunē - tap-i-nof-ros-oo'-nay

From a compound of G5011 and the base of G5424; humiliation of mind, that is, modesty: - humbleness of mind, humility (of mind), lowliness (of mind).
